name: Tera Autotech Corporation
summary: Tera Autotech Corporation manufactures and sells automation equipment in Taiwan. The company offers automatic storage and logistic equipment; whole plant automated logistic equipment; automatic re-grind machines, product inspection machines, RGV machines, and lock screw machines; CNC machines, welding equipment, and chamber processing machines; and measurement equipment. It also offers drill products, including standard, micro, large, UC, and slot drills, as well as router bits. The company was formerly known as Tera Automation Corporation and changed its name to Tera Autotech Corporation in 2001. Tera Autotech Corporation was founded in 1982 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.
